stablepiggy-napoleon-game-assistant.name: StablePiggy Napoleon Game Assistant
stablepiggy-napoleon-game-assistant.desc: AI-assisted co-GM module for Foundry VTT. Generates NPCs, remembers campaign lore, answers rules questions, and produces session prep.
stablepiggy-napoleon-game-assistant.sett: WebSocket URL the module connects to. Leave blank to disable AI features (schema and example NPC remain available as reference).
Shared secret or platform-issued token for relay authentication. Leave blank if the relay does not require authentication.
